name: gowth-mem
description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. v3.3 = deterministic-only retrieval (FTS5 BM25 + char-ngram Jaccard, no external embedding API in runtime path), 4-tier token-budget context planner, rtk-style pre-storage compression, heuristic contradiction lint. Multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution, SM-2 spaced resurfacing, mem0 ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP write semantics.
